agentMessage.excerpt:
All 5 steps complete. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**`internal/report/detailed.go`** (production):
- Added `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` import
- In `computeDimensionAverages()`: added `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before the dimensions loop, skipping unsupported-language records from sums/counts
- In `computeLanguageBreakdowns()`: added the same guard before per-language accumulation

**`internal/report/detailed_unsupported_test.go`** (new test):
- `TestDetailedReport_UnsupportedSkippedInAggregates`: creates a supported Go record and an unsupported "cobol" record, then verifies dimension averages reflect only the Go record (0.9 not 0.5) and language breakdowns exclude "cobol" entirely
